Project Description:
- Procurement of database-backed On-Premise PM software (out-of-the-box) per IPMA for project/program planning and multi-(portfolio)-management
- Scope: provision and implementation incl. maintenance & support
- Procedure: negotiated procedure with prior notice; framework agreement (no purchase obligation; no exclusivity); term 4 years
- Non-negotiable: On-Premise operation; no cloud-only solutions
Important Dates:
- Questions deadline: Monday, 26.08.2024, 12:00
- 2nd-stage invite: ~ +6 weeks after participation deadline; 1st offer due: ~ +4 weeks after invite; negotiations: ~ +1 week; last-offer invite: ~ +2 weeks; last offer due: ~ +2 weeks
- Contract signing: within 5 months after end of last-offer period

Scope & Requirements.Scope & Requirements:
- Deliverables:
  - Provide and implement On-Premise PM software in the ITSV data center; training to enable client self-administration; ongoing maintenance & support
- Key non-negotiable requirements (MUST):
  - On-Premise operation in ITSV’s data center; all functionalities On-Premise (no cloud-only)
  - German language UI
  - Single Sign-On; Microsoft Active Directory integration
  - Role-based permissions; access/edit/delete rights per project; must not be bypassable externally
  - Multi-user concurrency with assured data integrity; describe concurrency concept
  - Print/export all documents and reports (PDF); graphics easily reusable (e.g., PowerPoint)
  - Data access for 3rd-party systems via DB interface, file export, or web services (e.g., Microsoft Power BI)
- Administration & customization:
  - After training, client can administer (users, views, customizing)
  - Custom entities/fields; show/hide
- Ideas & requests:
  - Capture project ideas with configurable forms (description, goals, milestones, budget, dates); status workflow (e.g., idea recorded/qualified/released/approved/parked)
  - Link documents (e.g., Business Case)
  - Handle project-like initiatives without full projectworthiness
- Project planning (IPMA-aligned):
  - Project charter per IPMA; direct PDF generation; charter template must exist
  - Templates for project types; project categorization
  - Work Breakdown Structure (WBS/PSP) tree as main working dialog; >10 levels; WP/milestones include code, name, owner, dates, %progress, status, effort (h), costs
  - PSP⇄Gantt bidirectional sync
  - Gantt with EA/EE/AA relationships; critical path; lag times; forward/backward scheduling; milestone list view
  - Cost planning at WP/phase; printable/filterable cost reports
  - Risk management: record risks (status, probability scales, impact values, measures); graphical analysis and list views
  - Stakeholder/environment analysis: graphical (e.g., drag & drop); link docs; record measures
  - Baselines: store on release; multiple baselines retained and callable
  - Digital project handbook auto-filled from system; customizable; IPMA standard
  - Resource planning at WP/phase; team or named; hourly rate per resource
- Program management:
  - Program structure plan and Gantt like projects; similar planning/controlling functions
- Project controlling:
  - WP owner edit access; % progress roll-up; baseline vs current visualization (e.g., traffic light)
  - Resource status: baseline/actual/remaining/forecast
  - Cost controlling: changed future rates do not retro-change past actuals
  - Progress report and closure report (exportable) with custom fields; record deviations; trend analyses (milestones/costs)
- Portfolio management:
  - Ideas overview by status
  - Budget planning per portfolio: 1 numeric per cost type & period (year/quarter/month) for 1 portfolio
  - Multiple portfolios; project assignable pre/during execution
  - Configurable project list (group/filter), includes initiatives; save/export; Excel export of all tables
  - Portfolio-level costs, milestone control (flexible lists), risk list; one-pager; pipeline (planned/commissioned/in progress)
- Constraints:
  - Non-negotiable minimum requirements per § 114 Abs 1 BVergG 2018
  - No variant/alternative bids; single compliant main offer
  - Compliance with § 93 BVergG 2018, Austrian labor/social/environmental law; ILO Conventions Nos. 29, 87, 94, 95, 98, 100, 105, 111, 138, 182, 183
Scope & Requirements.Contract Volume:
- Framework agreement: 4 years; no purchase obligation; no exclusivity
- Estimated total value: EUR 720.000,-- exkl. USt (non-binding)
Scope & Requirements.Place of Performance:
- On-Premise operation in the ITSV data center (implementation and operation)
- IT-Services der Sozialversicherung GmbH, Johann-Böhm-Platz 1, 1020 Wien
- Österreichische Gesundheitskasse, Wienerbergstraße 15–19, 1100 Wien
Scope & Requirements.Standards & Certifications:
- IPMA methodology-aligned PM processes
- Compliance with § 93 BVergG 2018 and Austrian labor/social/environmental law
- ILO Conventions: 29, 87, 94, 95, 98, 100, 105, 111, 138, 182, 183
- EU sanctions compliance: Art 5k VO (EU) 833/2014 (as amended by VO (EU) 2022/576)
Scope & Requirements.Subcontracting & Consortia:
- Consortia allowed; members jointly and severally liable; appoint lead and authorized representative
- Subcontracting allowed; no full pass-through (except purchase contracts/affiliates); bidder remains liable
- Necessary subcontractors must be named in Form 5 with share of total performance; Form 6 commitment required
Scope & Requirements.Forms & e-Submission:
- Submission only via ANKÖ portal: https://gv.vergabeportal.at
- Qualified electronic signature required (ID-Austria; Handy-Signatur replaced on 05.12.2023)
- Forms as PDF + Excel; no paper/email/fax
- Language: German (tech descriptions in English allowed if no German version)
- ANKÖ support: +43 1 333 66 66 0; office@ankoe.at

Offer Submission Documents: Power of attorney (if not signed by authorized officers)
Electronically signed application via ANKÖ (PDF + Excel)
List of Documents: Trade/professional register extract (e.g., GISA) or foreign register (≤6 months)
Social insurance clearance or account statement (≤2 months) / WEBEKU
Credit rating: KSV 1870 rating ≤ 399 ("gering") or bank/WP confirmation
Balance sheet with notes (on request, if publishable)
Declaration of reliability (no § 78 Abs 1 BVergG exclusion)
Evidence for necessary subs (authority, capability, reliability)
Statement of joint liability if relying on subs’ financial capacity
German documents or certified German translations
Foreign equivalents or sworn statement if official docs unavailable

Economic & Financial Standing.Minimum Turnover: Average annual net revenue within the last 3 calendar years ≥ EUR 500.000,-- (if <3 years: 12× average monthly since inception).

Legal & Registration.Trade/Professional Register Entry: Gewerberegister (e.g., GISA) or foreign professional/commerce register per Annex IX BVergG 2018.
Legal & Registration.Self-declarations (GWB §§123/124 or equi: Declaration of professional reliability (no § 78 Abs 1 BVergG 2018 grounds); compliance with § 93 BVergG; EU sanctions self-declaration (Art 5k VO (EU) 833/2014).
Legal & Registration.Subcontractor Identification & Reliance: Name necessary subs in Form 5 incl. share; provide Form 6 commitment; evidence for subs; written consent required for changes; joint liability if relying on financial capacity.

Technical & Professional Ability.Personnel Profiles:
- Main contact (Hauptansprechpartner):
  - German proficiency ≥ C1 (GER); proof on request (certificate or secondary school exam in German)
  - IT and/or business education (HAK/FH/University) OR ≥ 5 years relevant experience
  - ≥ 1 reference in last 5 years as main contact or project manager that meets 7.6.1 criteria
  - Available during 4-year framework; interview possible; replacement only with consent and equal qualifications
Technical & Professional Ability.Headcount / Staffing:
- Provide a negotiation team incl. subject-matter experts and decision-makers for each round
- Ensure availability of the named main contact throughout the framework term
Technical & Professional Ability.Reference Projects: - For the main contact: ≥ 1 project in the last 5 years matching 7.6.1 (out-of-the-box PM software; PSP/Gantt/stakeholder/forms/handbook/program mgmt; ≥ 50 users; ≥ EUR 150.000,-- for provision+implementation; completed within 5 years). Provide CV; language proof on request.

Company Referrals:
- Minimum: 2 company reference projects (EU/EWR/CH; no intra-group self-references)
- Each must cover: provision & implementation of out-of-the-box PM software plus maintenance/support; functions incl. PSP graphic, Gantt (all relationships & critical path), stakeholder mgmt, PM forms (order/request/closure/changes), digital project handbook with report designer, program management
- Thresholds per reference: value for provision+implementation ≥ EUR 150.000,-- (excl. maintenance); ≥ 50 users (project managers & PMO; exclude team members/AP owners/time recorders/read-only); completed within last 5 years
- JV/sub role: detail concrete share (≥ 50%) of services; AG may verify with reference clients
Award Criteria:
- Award (Stage 2 – not negotiable):
  - Price 60% (price sheet): license costs; implementation costs; hourly/day rates
  - Quality 40%:
    - Quality 1: fulfillment of “Soll-Kriterien” (per Leistungsbeschreibung)
    - Quality 2: Test instance / live demo / task; assessed by expert panel on: usability; example On-Premise implementation; integration to client environment; professionalism/quality of demo/presenter; concept/presentation
- Tie-breakers: if equal total points → lower price; if equal price points → higher-weighted quality prevails
- Selection (Stage 1 – max 200 points):
  - Criterion 1: additional reference projects (max 80): 4=80; 3=60; 2=40; 1=20; 0=0 (must satisfy 7.6.1)
  - Criterion 2: reference projects meet extra criteria (max 120; up to 2 projects, each 60): public client 30; reference value > EUR 250.000,-- 20; > 75 active users 10
